title: Golden-set regression fixtures
oneline: Catalog-wide golden score freeze/diff works: deterministic, ~54s, caught one-page revert
summary: Froze all offline audit scores (solidity/eye-rings, light keep/localKeep+eyes, night drift/bgLuma/lineWhite+eyes) for 102 pages into one committed 67KB JSON in ~54s, after extracting the night gates from the generator into lib/night-scores.mjs. Re-freeze is byte-identical (deterministic) and a no-op diff is clean; reverting bee-wide's night raw to its pre-chalk version was caught as exactly that page (lineWhite 252->195, exit 1). 134 already-failing verdicts freeze as an explicit baseline so only changes gate. One caveat: a swap between two score-identical renders diffs clean — the golden set guards scores, not content identity.
tried: Extracted scoreDrift/scoreNightness/scoreLineColor from gen-coloring-fills-dark.mjs into lib/night-scores.mjs so committed night raws can be re-scored offline
Built audit-golden.mjs with --freeze/--diff modes over all 5 audit surfaces, 4-way concurrency
Cross-validated golden scores against all three canonical audits (drift, eyes, solidity)
Determinism check: two freezes byte-compared with cmp
One-page revert spot-check with two different historical assets
npm scripts gen:coloring:golden:freeze / :diff per ADR-0019, verified via npm run
Patch re-apply check on pristine tree plus a full diff run from the re-applied state
worked: Freeze: 102 pages in ~54s, fully offline, 0 Gemini calls
Byte-identical re-freeze (fully deterministic; no nondeterministic score found)
bee-wide night raw revert caught as exactly 1 page, exit 1 (bgLuma 43.9->49, lineWhite 252->195)
Golden numbers match canonical audits to the digit
134 known-failing verdicts frozen as explicit baseline without blocking
failed: First revert attempt (ant-wide light raw to a81be48) diffed clean — that older render is score-identical (keep 1.0/1.0) against the current outline, so score-invisible asset swaps exist
limitations: Guards scores, not content identity: two valid renders with identical rounded scores diff clean (a content-hash column would fix this at the cost of golden churn on every intentional regen)
Whole-catalog only (~1 min per diff), no page filter
Shipped punched fills/thumbs not scored (derived from raws by design)
No chalk-only metric exists in today's audits; chalks only show up via night scoring
night.eyesOk on the old dead-eyed bee raw did NOT flip because the current chalk composite rescues it — numeric movement detection carried that catch
